description.value:
Frequency once per day

Trigger An enemy's Strike against you is a critical hit.

You position your fortified crystalline hair to absorb some of the blow from an otherwise lethal attack. The triggering attack deals only the amount it would deal on a hit (typically full damage instead of double damage). Any other effects caused by a critical hit still occur. It takes a day for your shattered hair to regrow, and until it does, you take a –2 circumstance penalty to Diplomacy checks with other moyishuus.
